untranslatable_reason: Signal requires detection of: (1) 5+ day consolidation/support holding — no single indicator directly measures consolidation duration or support persistence; (2) catalyst signal or emerging event — market catalysts are exogenous events not measurable from price/volume data alone. The conditions specified are event-driven and require external data feeds or news sentiment analysis not available in the allowed indicator set.
translation_notes: Translated breakout with volume confirmation using Donchian channels and vol_ratio_20. Used pivot support (s1) for stop loss approximation. However, core logic around consolidation detection and catalyst emergence cannot be fully operationalized with price-action indicators alone. This signal fundamentally requires event data or external catalyst monitoring beyond standard technical indicators.
